problem: How to achieve sustained net-positive nuclear fusion at commercial scale?
mechanism: Resonant inductive coupling for wireless power
hypothesis: How to achieve sustained net-positive nuclear fusion at commercial scale? remains unsolved because previous research missed the role of Resonant. Resonant inductive coupling for wireless power directly addresses this.

experiment.protocol: Materials characterization (XRD, SEM) with 12 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The impediment to action advances action. What stands in the way becomes the way. — Marcus Aurelius
